'''Umgullian blob 14''' was an [[Umgullian blob]] owned by [[Vob Bitas]]. During a [[Blob racing|race]] on [[Fondine Blob Raceways]] on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]], Bitas enhanced his blob with viscosity-enhancing substances. They were found in the blob at the end of the race, and Bitas was sentenced to death for cheating.
